requirement_topic.en: IEC 62619 Cell and Module Safety — SLSI Baseline for BESS
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62619电芯与模组安全——斯里兰卡BESS的SLSI基线
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62619電芯與模組安全——斯里蘭卡BESS的SLSI基線

summary.en: Sri Lanka Standards Institution (SLSI) adopts IEC standards as the technical baseline for electrical and energy-storage equipment. For BESS lithium-ion cells and battery modules, IEC 62619 (Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications) is the primary safety standard. SLSI may require product registration or conformity evidence before importation and sale of BESS components. Importers should confirm the current SLSI type-approval or registration requirement for battery energy storage with SLSI before shipment.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡标准局（SLSI）采用IEC标准作为电气和储能设备的技术基线。对于BESS锂离子电芯和电池模组，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）为主要安全标准。SLSI可能要求进口和销售BESS部件前提供产品注册或符合性证据。进口商在出货前应向SLSI确认当前电池储能型式批准或注册要求。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡標準局（SLSI）採用IEC標準作為電氣和儲能設備的技術基線。對於BESS鋰離子電芯和電池模組，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）為主要安全標準。SLSI可能要求進口和銷售BESS部件前提供產品注冊或符合性證據。進口商在出貨前應向SLSI確認當前電池儲能型式批准或注冊要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619: Secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications — Safety requirements
SLSI type-approval or registration requirements for energy storage equipment

summary.en: China uses GB 44240-2024 as the compulsory safety requirement for lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric energy storage, and GB/T 36276-2023 as the recommended technical standard for electric energy storage lithium-ion batteries. IEC 62619 and Chinese GB 44240-2024 have significant technical overlap for cell-level safety, but they are different standards with different testing and certification bodies. Chinese GB certification does not replace IEC 62619 test evidence required by SLSI.
summary.zh: 中国以GB 44240-2024作为电力储能用锂离子电芯和电池的强制安全要求，以GB/T 36276-2023作为电力储能用锂离子电池推荐性技术标准。IEC 62619与中国GB 44240-2024在电芯级安全方面有较大技术重叠，但属于不同标准，测试和认证机构不同。中国GB认证不能替代SLSI要求的IEC 62619测试证据。
summary.zht: 中國以GB 44240-2024作為電力儲能用鋰離子電芯和電池的強制安全要求，以GB/T 36276-2023作為電力儲能用鋰離子電池推薦性技術標準。IEC 62619與中國GB 44240-2024在電芯級安全方面有較大技術重疊，但屬於不同標準，測試和認證機構不同。中國GB認證不能替代SLSI要求的IEC 62619測試證據。

gap.en: Chinese GB 44240-2024 or GB/T 36276-2023 test reports do not substitute for IEC 62619 test evidence. Exporters should obtain IEC 62619 test reports from an internationally accredited laboratory, confirm SLSI registration or type-approval requirements for BESS before shipment, and prepare English-language technical documentation for SLSI and project-owner review.
gap.zh: 中国GB 44240-2024或GB/T 36276-2023测试报告不能替代IEC 62619测试证据。出口商应从国际认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试报告，出货前向SLSI确认BESS注册或型式批准要求，并准备英文技术文件供SLSI和项目业主审查。
gap.zht: 中國GB 44240-2024或GB/T 36276-2023測試報告不能替代IEC 62619測試證據。出口商應從國際認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試報告，出貨前向SLSI確認BESS注冊或型式批准要求，並準備英文技術文件供SLSI和項目業主審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where SLSI type-approval or registration applies to BESS; IEC 62619 is the technical standard baseline
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under GB 44240-2024 for domestic Chinese market; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB 44240-2024 or GB/T 36276-2023 reports do not satisfy SLSI IEC 62619 requirements. Obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an accredited laboratory and confirm SLSI registration requirements before shipping BESS to Sri Lanka.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB 44240-2024或GB/T 36276-2023报告不满足SLSI IEC 62619要求。出货斯里兰卡BESS前，需从认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据并确认SLSI注册要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB 44240-2024或GB/T 36276-2023報告不滿足SLSI IEC 62619要求。出貨斯里蘭卡BESS前，需從認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據並確認SLSI注冊要求。
